read.text:
The village notice board, curling at the corners:

— "REWARD: for the opening of the mill path & removal of the trouble therein. Apply to Elder Senna. Seriously. Anyone."
— "LOST: the sound of the dusk bell. Sentimental value. — T."
— "PELL'S SUNDRIES remains OPEN and OPTIMISTIC."
— A child's charcoal drawing of a tall grey figure, crossed out very hard.

voices.text: Someone re-pins these notices when the wind takes them. In a town this tired, that's not admin — that's hope, doing maintenance.
